name: DUOS TECHNOLOGIES GROUP, INC.
business: Duos Technologies Group, Inc. delivers AI-driven technologies, edge computing infrastructure, and energy consulting services through its subsidiaries Duos Edge AI, Duos Technologies, and Duos Energy. The company targets data-intensive and mission-critical operations across education, healthcare, service providers, enterprise, and public sector markets.

exposures.sentence: Through Duos Edge AI, the Company's flagship subsidiary expected to generate most if not all of the anticipated growth going forward, the Company develops modular, rapidly deployable Edge Data Centers intended to bring enterprise-grade computing capacity closer to end users.
Duos is positioned to serve the growing demand for high-performance computing and AI-driven applications through its high-density EDC solutions and GPU-as-a-Service (GPUaaS) offerings.

The Company is focused on expanding a distributed digital infrastructure platform designed to support: AI and machine learning workloads, Edge and latency-sensitive applications, Carrier-neutral connectivity, Regional and underserved market deployments, Enterprise and public-sector digital modernization initiatives.

Legacy Intelligent Technology Solutions: Historically, the Company designed, developed, and deployed intelligent inspection and analytics solutions utilizing machine vision and artificial intelligence for transportation and logistics applications.
We are dependent on information technology networks and systems to securely process, transmit and store electronic information... the risk of security breaches and cyberattacks increases.
Duos Energy Corporation (Duos Energy) with the express purpose of providing consulting services and solutions for the rapidly growing demand for electrical power outside of traditional utilities.

catalysts.event: Asset Management Agreement with New APR signed
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, Sawgrass Buyer LLC (now known as New APR Energy, LLC) entered into an Asset Management Agreement (AMA) with the Company under which a substantial portion of Company staff would oversee the operations of New APR.

catalysts.event: First Edge Data Center became live
catalysts.sentence: The $56,000 of revenues recorded in the year 2025 represent those received from the first data center which became live in the second quarter.

catalysts.event: Patent granted for modular data center entryway
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, the Company, through its subsidiary Duos Edge AI, Inc., was granted a U.S. patent for an Entryway for a Modular Data Center.

catalysts.event: Public offering of common stock closed
catalysts.sentence: On July 30, 2025, the Company priced a public offering of its common stock for net proceeds of approximately $37.1 million. The offering closed on August 1, 2025.

On September 2, 2025, the Underwriter exercised the Over-Allotment Option in full to purchase 838,851 shares of Common Stock, generating additional net proceeds of approximately $4.7 million. The Over-Allotment Option closed on September 2, 2025.

catalysts.event: Public offering of common stock for $65 million
catalysts.sentence: On February 26, 2026, the Company priced a public offering of its common stock for gross proceeds of approximately $65 million. The offering closed on March 2, 2026.
